steps.title: Locate the right angle and the angle equal to $W$
steps.content: Check the Pythagorean theorem: $440^2+384^2=341056=584^2$, so the right angle is at $S$ and $TR$ is the hypotenuse. Since $T$ corresponds to $W$, $\tan W=\tan T$.

steps.title: Compute the tangent ratio
steps.content: For angle $T$, the opposite leg is $RS=440$ and the adjacent leg is $ST=384$. $$\tan W=\tan T=\frac{440}{384}=\frac{55}{48}.$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
